---
title: Heihawru
tags:

- misc
---
| Name     | Description                  |
| -------- | ---------------------------- |
| Heihawru | seeitreaditthinkitsolveit 29 |

This challenge requires a bit of trial and error attempt since the file given contains a random strings but the pattern shows that it kinda like a poem with the formatting. Lets throw it in [Cyberchef](https://gchq.github.io/CyberChef/#recipe=ROT13(true,true,false,23)&). This appears to be a rotated characters and ROT23 does the trick and we successfully recovered the whole *sajak(poem)*
![[writeup/bo1337-2022/assets/heihawru/heihawru-20220719111204262.png]]

Now, notice at the bottom of the file, there is a some sort of sequance of numbers hard-coded which is most likely a position of a characters. For example, **5(line):6(word):2(character)**

![[writeup/bo1337-2022/assets/heihawru/heihawru-20220719111355794.png]]

Lets decode this one by one and we successfully retrieved the flag.
```
BO1337flAgisdarK3noKluai
```

## Reference
- https://gchq.github.io/CyberChef/
